headline: Cadence Announces Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results Webcast
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., July 06, 2026--Cadence (Nasdaq: CDNS) will hold its second quarter 2026 financial results webcast on Monday, July 27, 2026
